strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and infrastructure domains—exceeds 15-year minimum
Demonstrated entrepreneurship and product leadership through founding and maintaining GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform with real-world adoption
Full-stack technical depth with infrastructure expertise (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines) and community building through workshops and talks
concerns: Zero AI/ML expertise in entire career—no machine learning projects, AI products, or deep learning work mentioned despite role focusing on AI strategy and differentiation

No evidence of director-level strategic leadership or principal engineer responsibilities; most recent role (April 2025) is staff-level with AI-agent infrastructure work that is too junior and tooling-focused rather than strategic
Missing advanced credentials (no Master's or PhD) and no recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI-powered platforms—current AI exposure limited to MCP code generators and infrastructure tooling
response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned full-stack engineer with 20 years of industry experience and a track record of building products like GISCollective. However, this role explicitly targets Principal Engineer-level expertise in AI strategy—identifying differentiation opportunities through AI, advising customers on AI adoption, and building recognized AI platforms. The resume contains zero AI/ML experience across two decades of work. His current exposure to 'AI-agent infrastructure' at re:cinq (started April 2025) is too recent, junior-level, and infrastructure-focused rather than demonstrating strategic AI product or platform expertise. Without demonstrated AI domain knowledge and the preferred advanced credentials in AI-related fields, he cannot fulfill the core responsibilities of this AI-specialized principal role.
